titles.en: Chapter on Compensation for judges' Errors
Chapter on Compensation for judges' Errors

segments: : قَضَى أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّ مَا أَخْطَأَتِ اَلْقُضَاةُ فِي دَمٍ أَوْ قَطْعٍ فَهُوَ عَلَى بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ.
arabic.text: : قَضَى أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّ مَا أَخْطَأَتِ اَلْقُضَاةُ فِي دَمٍ أَوْ قَطْعٍ فَهُوَ عَلَى بَيْتِ مَالِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ.

segments:
Hadith.3231 - It is narrated from Al-Asbagh ibn Nubatah that he said:
Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled that any error made by judges concerning bloodshed or amputation is to be compensated from the public treasury of the Muslims.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3231 - It is narrated from Al-Asbagh ibn Nubatah that he said:
Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled that any error made by judges concerning bloodshed or amputation is to be compensated from the public treasury of the Muslims.

narratorChain.raw: 3231 - رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْأَصْبَغِ بْنِ نُبَاتَةَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ
